sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ السُّوقُ التَّقْلِيدِيُّ القَلْبَ النَّابِضَ لِلْمَدِينَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ القَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalna pijaca predstavlja kucajuće srce starog arapskog grada.
sentences.translationEn: The traditional market represents the beating heart of the ancient Arab city.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ الأَزِقَّةُ الضَّيِّقَةُ بِرَوَائِحِ التَّوَابِلِ الزَّكِيَّةِ وَالعُطُورِ النَّادِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Uski sokaci ispunjeni su mirisima prijatnih začina i rijetkih parfema.
sentences.translationEn: Narrow alleys are filled with the pleasant scents of spices and rare perfumes.

sentences.arabic: يَعْرِضُ التُّجَّارُ المَنْسُوجَاتِ المُلَوَّنَةَ وَالحَلِيَّ المَصْنُوعَةَ يَدَوِيًّا بِفَخْرٍ وَاعْتِزَازٍ.
sentences.translation: Trgovci s ponosom i dostojanstvom izlažu šarene tkanine i ručno izrađen nakit.
sentences.translationEn: Merchants proudly display colorful textiles and handmade jewelry.

sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ عَمَلِيَّةُ "المُسَاوَمَةِ" طَقْسًا اجْتِمَاعِيًّا يَتَطَلَّبُ الصَّبْرَ وَرُوحَ الدُّعَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Proces cjenkanja smatra se društvenim ritualom koji zahtijeva strpljenje i smisao za humor.
sentences.translationEn: The process of bargaining is considered a social ritual that requires patience and a sense of humor.

sentences.arabic: لَيْسَ السُّوقُ مَكَانًا لِلتِّجَارَةِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ هُوَ مَلْتَقًى لِلْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَتَبَادُلِ الأَخْبَارِ.
sentences.translation: Pijaca nije samo mjesto za trgovinu, već i sastajalište prijatelja i prostor za razmjenu vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: The market is not just a place for trade, but a meeting point for friends and an exchange of news.

sentences.arabic: يَجِدُ الزَّائِرُ فِيهِ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ، مِنَ التُّحَفِ الأَثَرِيَّةِ إِلَى البَضَائِعِ العَصْرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetitelj tamo može pronaći sve, od arheoloških antikviteta do savremene robe.
sentences.translationEn: Visitors can find everything there, from archaeological antiques to modern goods.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الحِفَاظَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقِ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِحِمَايَةِ الهُوِيَّةِ العُمْرَانِيَّةِ لِلْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Očuvanje ovih pijaca je neophodno za zaštitu arhitektonskog identiteta društva.
sentences.translationEn: Preserving these markets is essential for protecting the architectural identity of the society.
